label: Lacks Discipline
description: 'Works only when I tell him', no self-initiative

label: Motivated but Directionless
description: Enthusiasm + confusion: 'She wants to help but doesn't know where to start'

label: Careless and Inconsistent
description: Output exists but quality varies: 'Sometimes good, sometimes sloppy'

label: Consistent Performer
description: Reliable task execution: 'Does what I ask, meets standards'

label: Reliable and Productive
description: High trust: 'I give him a task and forget about it. It gets done.' (Executes tasks defined by someone else)

label: Problem Identifier
description: Spots patterns: 'She noticed our rejection rate goes up on Mondays' (Identifies problems the supervisor hadn't asked about)

label: Problem Solver
description: Identifies AND fixes: 'He built a tracking system for dispatch delays'

label: Innovative and Experimental
description: Builds new tools/processes, tests approaches, creates MVPs

label: Exceptional Performer
description: Everything at 9, flawlessly, and others learn from their work
